must_preserve_evidence: MP-001/MP-002/G-SCOPE: tests use provider bundle records only; no Settings JSON backup, OAuth state, chat, MCP, skills, workflows, or global settings are involved.
MP-004/MP-010: tests expect the store to call a secret-free export API action; they do not treat frontend masking as the security boundary.
MP-007: request-shape test asserts no includeSecrets, activeId, or defaultProviderId fields are sent.
Export non-mutation test asserts no provider activation calls and activeId remains unchanged.
concerns: The focused RED currently stops at the missing providerStore export action before request-shape assertions execute. Once T007 adds the action, these assertions will validate the secret-free request shape and returned bundle.
The working diff also shows existing runtime refresh expectation changes relative to HEAD in the same file; they were already present in the initial read and were left intact.
recovery_hints: Implement providersApi.exportProviders(input) in desktop/src/api/providers.ts to POST /api/providers/export with only providerIds/all.

Expose providerStore.exportProviders(input) in desktop/src/stores/providerStore.ts, call providersApi.exportProviders(input), return response.bundle, and do not call activate/fetch activation paths or mutate activeId.
